title: 埃及十字架之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\27-埃及十字架之谜-埃勒里奎因.txt
summary:
Determined to prevent a fourth murder, Ellery Queen decides to travel to West Virginia. He believes the killer, Croscak, is heading toward the mountains to hide and has likely already murdered Megalos to obtain information. Because a severe storm prevents Ellery from hiring a plane through Minola Airport, he chooses to drive his old Duesenberg sports car. He instructs Professor Yadley to remain behind and attempt to contact Vaughn and Eisam.

Ellery begins his journey at one o'clock, driving through New York City, the Holland Tunnel, and various towns in New Jersey and Pennsylvania. Despite heavy rain and poor road conditions, he drives at high speeds, eventually reaching Harrisburg and later Hollidaysburg. After spending a night at a hotel, Ellery continues through Pittsburgh. By 11:30 a.m. the following day, he arrives in Aroo Village, West Virginia.

Upon arriving at the town hall, Ellery enters Judge Lutten's empty office. A man in a blue gingham shirt follows him and informs him that the judge is not present. While searching the judge's desk, Ellery discovers a yellow telegram addressed to Sheriff Redden in Aroo. The telegram instructs the sheriff to assemble a police force to guard "Old Pete's shack" and to report Croscak's return to Krutem. It further instructs that if the situation at the shack has already occurred, the police should find Croscak's tracks without disturbing the scene.
